tweets.full_text:
GPT 5.6 Sol just hit CursorBench. 

The economics are brutal for Anthropic.

Fable 5 Max: 70.5% at $17.32 per task. 103,525 tokens.
GPT 5.6 Sol Max: 67.2% at $5.22 per task. 28,320 tokens.

95% of the performance. A third of the cost. 73% fewer tokens.

Fable 5 kept the crown on https://t.co/kWCA81lpD7
tweets.summary: GPT 5.6 Sol在CursorBench测试中性能达67.2%，成本仅$5.22/任务，为Fable 5的三分之一成本。Fable 5保持榜首，但Sol性价比优势明显。
angles: GPT 5.6 Sol成本仅三分之一，性价比碾压Fable 5

tweets.full_text:
Attention NVIDIA users playing Wuthering Waves !

→ The new region has poor performance on Native resolution and may cause heavy stuttering.

Fix:

• Set DLSS to Quality
• Set Shader Cache Size to Unlimited
This should significantly reduce the stuttering issues.

Thread https://t.co/kWD9XeDZKe
tweets.summary: 鸣潮新地区在原生分辨率下性能不佳，NVIDIA用户可通过设置DLSS为质量模式、无限制着色器缓存来优化卡顿问题。
